questions: What is the patient's weight in kg?
Does the patient have any known allergies? (Yes/No)
What is the etiology of the hypovolemic shock (e.g., hemorrhage, diarrhea, vomiting, burns, nephrotic syndrome)?
Is the shock refractory to fluid resuscitation? (Yes/No)
If refractory, which inotropic therapy is chosen (Dopamine, Dobutamine, Nor-epinephrine)?
Is the etiology diarrhea or vomiting? (Yes/No)
